items.summary: Chapter opener 'So wohne ich': match ten furniture words to numbered picture items.
Answer with nein/kein from pictures, then match household objects to the pronouns er, sie, es.
Tick boxes about your home's type, location, size and features, then write a short description.
Match rooms to adjectives by listening, build room dialogues, and rate rooms with adjectives.
Read Patrick's room description, mark five true/false statements, then describe your own room.
Fill gaps in Tina's room text, then listen and complete a real-estate agency form.
Offer drinks to six people and write short 'would you rather drink' dialogues from pictures.
Complete a greeting-and-drink dialogue, pick the odd drink out, and match drink questions to answers.
Pets: write what two girls say about a kitten, then build sentences about owning animals.
Pets: work out who owns which animal, then read about Melanie's dog and fill gaps.
Give exaggerated 'I have many pets' answers, then match countries with their language and capital.
State where seven classmates come from and say, in Q&A form, what language each speaks.
Build sentences on where seven people come from and match each person to their nationality.
Complete a dialogue asking Efer about his origin, then fill an interview table by listening.
Reconstruct the interviewer's questions to Herr Dupont, then complete a quiz-show profile by listening.
Grammar drills: conjugate the present tense of sprechen, haben, kommen and trinken.
Grammar drills: conjugate trinken and mögen and practise the möchte(n) form in sentences.
Grammar drills: choose Wer or Was, form questions, and supply articles and dir/Ihnen forms.
